title: 破镜谋杀案
source_file: data\raw\detectiveqa\novel_data_en\137-破镜谋杀案-阿加莎克里斯蒂.txt
summary:
Jason Radle and Ella Jelinski discuss the late happiness of a woman, whom Jason believes was like a child when content. Ella expresses cynicism regarding lasting happiness and notes that Giuseppe has gone to London to visit a sick relative in Soho. Jason expresses intense concern for Marina, stating she is in danger. After Ella leaves the office to retrieve nasal spray for her hay fever, she enters her bathroom and uses a spray bottle. She realizes too late that the liquid has a bitter almond taste, indicating she has inhaled cyanide.

In a separate investigation, Frank Koenig informs Clutter that Miss Bristow was not in London on the day in question. Clutter and Koenig discuss the possibility that the butler, who is also in London, could have slipped cyanide into Eileen's inhaler. Later, Claddock calls Adwick Fenn to inform him of Ella Jelinski's death by cyanide poisoning. Fenn suggests that Jason Radle might have information regarding her motives. Fenn then reveals that Ella had previously called him, claiming she saw him put pills in a drink, implying she was attempting to blackmail him. Fenn identifies the caller as Ella because the voice sneezed, a symptom of her hay fever. Claddock informs Fenn that his whereabouts will be investigated. Claddock, Clark, and Cuney discuss whether Fenn’s explanation is a "grand deception" involving a fake alibi.

Meanwhile, Joseph returns to Gosington Manor after midnight. As he enters his suite and turns the key in the lock, he feels a hard object against his back and is ordered by a voice to raise his hands and remain silent.
